title: AGNI Feature Flags
description: A/B feature flags with rollout percentages and deterministic student assignment. Used for controlled experiments and gradual feature rollouts.

flags.description: Map of flag name to flag definition.

enabled.description: Whether the flag is globally active.

rollout.description: Percentage of students included in the treatment group (0–100).

description.description: Human-readable description of the flag's purpose.

metric.description: Telemetry metric used to evaluate the flag (e.g. 'mastery', 'completion_rate', 'frustration_score').
